body.title: DESIGNED: Map and plan _process_inner dismantle — 3445-line method in main.py
body.result: Design doc at lab/design_docs/_process_inner_dismantle.md. 11-phase map (LOC ranges), data handoffs, 8-module split proposal, A→G extraction sequence. Commit f7df1ab3.
body.description:
main.py._process_inner runs from line 3531 to ~6976 — 3445 lines. This is independently a problem: blocks future audits, blocks Igor reasoning about his own loop, blocks any move toward concurrent settling. This is an INVESTIGATE ticket: map what is in there, identify natural seam lines, write a phased refactor plan as a design doc. Do not implement in this ticket.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/main.py (lines 3531-6976) — read-only investigation; output is a design doc in lab/design_docs/
**Design rules:** none-apply (investigation only)
**Scope boundary:** IN: read _process_inner end-to-end; identify phase boundaries and data dependencies; produce refactor plan with proposed module splits. OUT: do not touch any code in this ticket.
**Test plan:** no tests — this ticket produces a design doc, not code.
**Pass condition:** A design doc exists at lab/design_docs/_process_inner_dismantle.md naming the proposed phases, their boundaries, and the sequencing for extraction.
